queries.question: Show the staff from Wester Medical Centre who work as radiologists or ultrasound technicians.
queries.sql:
SELECT Doctors.name 
FROM Doctors JOIN Hospitals ON Doctors.hospital_id = Hospitals.id
WHERE (Doctors.specialist_doctor = "Radiologist" OR Doctors.specialist_doctor = "Ultrasound Technician") AND Hospitals.name = "Western Medical Center"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?doctors a :Doctors .
  ?hospitals a :Hospitals .
  ?doctors p:hasHospitals ?hospitals .
  ?doctors p:name ?name .
  ?doctors p:specialist_doctor ?specialist_doctor_w .
  ?doctors p:specialist_doctor ?specialist_doctor_w2 .
  ?hospitals p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?specialist_doctor_w) = "Radiologist" || STR(?specialist_doctor_w2) = "Ultrasound Technician")) && STR(?name_w) = "Western Medical Center"))
}

queries.question: Give me all radiologists across all hospitals and just the ultrasound technicians who work at Western Medical Centre.
queries.sql:
SELECT Doctors.name 
FROM Doctors JOIN Hospitals ON Doctors.hospital_id = Hospitals.id
WHERE Doctors.specialist_doctor = "Radiologist" OR Doctors.specialist_doctor = "Ultrasound Technician" AND Hospitals.name = "Western Medical Center"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?doctors a :Doctors .
  ?hospitals a :Hospitals .
  ?doctors p:hasHospitals ?hospitals .
  ?doctors p:name ?name .
  ?doctors p:specialist_doctor ?specialist_doctor_w .
  ?doctors p:specialist_doctor ?specialist_doctor_w2 .
  ?hospitals p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?specialist_doctor_w) = "Radiologist" || (STR(?specialist_doctor_w2) = "Ultrasound Technician" && STR(?name_w) = "Western Medical Center")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show all radiologists and ultrasound technicians at Western Medical Centre.
